programme.title: Hell of a Summer
programme.desc: 24-year-old Jason Hochberg, together with his co-workers, is supposed to take care of the youth camp participants.A serial killer appears in the area.Other staff members become the psychopath's target.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Two ice hockey players, Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie), are united not only by ambition and the need for competition, but also by a magnetic attraction that neither of them fully understands.What begins as a secret romance between two debutants turns into an extraordinary love journey.Athletes spend eight years chasing fame on the ice rink while trying to deal with their feelings off it.They must decide whether there is room for something as fragile as love in a world of brutal competition.

credits.actor: Man in the Crease Host #2 - Shaun Starr
Man in the Crease Host #1 - Conor McKenna

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: Idaho.Doctor Joey (Leighton Meester) goes to meet Brother Gray (Taran Killam), who is organizing a rafting trip on the Salmon River.There he meets his long-time friend Trevor (Adam Brody), who is on parole, and two young women.Initially, the rafting takes place in a relaxed atmosphere.Everything changes on their first night together, when the kayakers set up camp.One of the young women suffers serious injuries.The circumstances of the incident are unclear, and the injured party herself claims that she was the victim of an attack.The incident disturbs the peace of Joey and the other participants of the expedition.However, it turns out that this is only the beginning of the problems.

programme.title: Drużyna AA
programme.desc: Four cross-dependent alcoholics, Leszek (Michał Żurawski), Wiola (Danuta Stenka), Dominik (Mikołaj Kubacki) and Karolina (Maria Sobocińska), participate, together with others, in therapy conducted by Wojtek (Łukasz Simlat).One day they learn that their center is to be closed due to financial problems.To raise money to save it, his friends undertake to illegally transport two tankers of spirit across Poland.Additionally, realizing their problems, they kidnap the therapist for their own safety.Following them - or rather the illegal alcohol they are transporting - follows the customs officer Klementyna (Magdalena Cielecka).However, the woman is not the person she claims to be.

programme.title: Broke
programme.desc: Former rodeo champion True cannot accept the end of his career.He is surprised by a violent blizzard.He fights for survival.

programme.title: A Royal Affair
programme.desc: 18th century.The young English aristocrat Caroline Matilda of Hanover (Alicia Vikander) marries the Danish king Christian VII (Mikkel Boe Folsgaard) as part of a political alliance.A smart, well-read and beautiful girl tries to cope with her new role.However, she finds no happiness with her exalted husband who shows signs of mental illness.When the German doctor Johann Friedrich Struensee (Mads Mikkelsen), whom the monarch has absolute trust in, appears at the court, the royal wife treats him with reluctance.Over time, however, she discovers how much she has in common with the progressive doctor, a follower of the ideas of the Enlightenment and a liberal who read the books of Voltaire, Rousseau and Locke.The two begin a passionate affair.Struensee gains more and more power and, with the support of Karolina Matilda, carries out innovative reforms.He makes many enemies.The court dignitaries, who have so far manipulated the king, do not intend to accept the loss of influence.They plot to get rid of the queen's lover.

credits.actor: Schack Carl Rantzau - Thomas W. Gabrielsson
J. H. E. Bernstoff - Bent Mejding
Augusta - Princess of Wales - Harriet Walter

programme.title: P.S. I Love You
programme.desc: After the death of her husband Gerry (Gerard Butler), Holly (Hilary Swank) falls into a deep depression.On her 30th birthday, a woman receives a mysterious parcel.The cake comes with a tape with a recorded message from... Gerry.He encourages his beloved to go out and have fun with friends.After this event, new letters regularly arrived to the young widow, each ending with a declaration of love.Gerry knew how much his wife would suffer from losing him.In letters written before her death, he encourages her to take on various challenges.Thanks to her extraordinary sense of connection with the deceased, a woman in despair undergoes specific therapy and tries to start her life anew.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Young Peter Parker (Andrew Garfield) tries to reconcile the responsibilities of an average student with the challenges of being a superhero.As a human, the spider protects representatives of humanity from evil.Remembering a promise he once made to his girlfriend's father, he breaks up with his beloved Gwen (Emma Stone).It soon turns out that the city's inhabitants are in danger from Electro (Jamie Foxx), a living energy generator.Meanwhile, Harry Osborne (Dane DeHaan), Peter's childhood friend, continues the secret project of his late father, the head of Oscorp, that threatens humanity.Seriously ill, he becomes convinced that only a transfusion of blood from Spider-Man will save him.

credits.actor: Green Goblin / Harry Osborn - Dane DeHaan

programme.title: Four Letters of Love
programme.desc: Ireland.Margaret (Helena Bonham Carter) and Muiris (Gabriel Byrne) Gore have two children, Sean (Dónal Finn) and Isabel (Ann Skelly).The family's happiness is disturbed by the unexpected illness of their son.On another part of the island lives William Coughlan (Pierce Brosnan), who quit his job and left his loved ones to follow his dreams of being a painter.The fates of two families intertwine thanks to the Gore's daughter and the son of an unfulfilled artist, Nicholas (Fionn O'Shea).It turns out that young people are made for each other, even though they know nothing about each other.Destiny and the desire for love push them towards each other.Adaptation of the book of the same title by Niall Williams.

programme.title: Long Good Thursday
programme.desc: Finland.A widowed farmer becomes a model for the eccentric artist Saimi.A feeling develops between them.This does not please the man's adult sons, who are afraid of losing their property.

programme.title: Monsieur Aznavour
programme.desc: Paris, 1930s. The son of immigrants takes part in a theater performance.This is how he discovers his vocal talent and decides to become a singer.A breakthrough in his career was his meeting with Edith Piaf.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: Macbeth returns from his war expedition.The witches predict a great future for him.The man's ambition and lust for power awaken, additionally fueled by his wife.However, his path to the throne will be bloody.

programme.title: Rumble Through the Dark
programme.desc: Jack Boucher (Aaron Eckhart), once an undefeated boxer, now lives in poverty, tormented by memories of the orphanage.In debt to Big Momma Sweet (Marianne Jean-Baptiste), he tries to win at the casino.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Caught Stealing
programme.desc: 1990s. Former baseball player Hank Thompson (Austin Butler) works as a bartender in a New York pub.He has a great girlfriend (Zoë Kravitz) and a championship-fighting team.His calm and orderly life changes when his neighbor Russ (Matt Smith) asks him to look after his cat for a few days.Then, out of nowhere, a gang of gangsters attacks Hank.Puerto Ricans, Russians and Jews are out to get him and he has no idea why.He will only find out what's going on if his wits and luck allow him to stay alive long enough.

programme.title: Battle After Another
programme.desc: Pat (Leonardo DiCaprio) hides under a changed name as Bob Ferguson with his daughter Willa in a town in the desert.No one knows that in the past, this inconspicuous man was the leader of a group of revolutionaries that committed numerous acts of sabotage: his accomplices freed refugees, robbed banks and blew up government buildings.Sixteen years after the attack on the prison, the leader of the elusive gang is tracked down by his old enemy, Colonel Steven Lockjaw (Sean Penn), who was obsessed with Bob's beloved, Willy's mother.When the girl is kidnapped, her desperate father asks her former mentor (Benicio Del Toro) for help.Together they set off to search for the hostage.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: Macbeth returns from his war expedition.The witches predict a great future for him.The man's ambition and lust for power awaken, additionally fueled by his wife.However, his path to the throne will be bloody.

programme.title: Long Good Thursday
programme.desc: Finland.A widowed farmer becomes a model for the eccentric artist Saimi.A feeling develops between them.This does not please the man's adult sons, who are afraid of losing their property.

programme.title: Monsieur Aznavour
programme.desc: Paris, 1930s. The son of immigrants takes part in a theater performance.This is how he discovers his vocal talent and decides to become a singer.A breakthrough in his career was his meeting with Edith Piaf.

programme.title: Noe: Wybrany przez Boga
programme.desc: The distant past.Due to the wickedness of Cain's descendants, the inhabitants of large cities, the world is falling into decline.Only representatives of the House of Set still carry out the will of the Creator.One night, former warrior and healer Noah (Russell Crowe) has a terrible dream.He sees it as a gigantic flood that destroys the world.Along with his wife Naameh (Jennifer Connelly) and three sons, he visits his grandfather Methuselah (Anthony Hopkins) to seek his advice.He discovers that his dream is actually a prediction of the great flood.Noah becomes aware that he has been chosen by the Creator to save the lives of innocents.With the help of stone giants called Guardians, he begins work on an ark that will be a shelter for various animal species.Years later, when the specter of disaster becomes more and more real, the huge ship is almost ready.Then the descendant of the first murderer, the self-proclaimed ruler Tubal-kain (Ray Winstone), demands a place in the ark for himself and his subjects.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The ninja turtles defeated their eternal enemy Shredder and each of them found a different job.Michaelangelo makes money at children's parties as a mascot.Donatello works as a telephone operator, and Leonardo exercises his character in solitude.Only Raphael remained faithful to his old ideals and fights hooligans at night.Meanwhile, Master Splinter begins to see signs of impending danger.Immortal entrepreneur, Maximilian J. Winters decides to take control of New York, and later the entire world.To do this, he summons his four stone generals and tries to open the gate to another dimension.Only a team of Teenage Mutant Turtles can stop him.

programme.title: Silicon Valley 6
programme.desc: The unusual adventures of exceptionally bright new technology specialists living in Silicon Valley in California.They are no strangers to start-ups or running online companies.Programmer Richard Hendricks and his friends dream of a career like Mark Zuckerberg, the creator of Facebook.The men are extremely intelligent, they have great ideas, but at the same time they are young people lost in life and quite unpredictable in interpersonal relationships.Director Mike Judge based the script on his personal experiences when he worked as an engineer at a company near Palo Alto.Viewers will see the Satellite Award nominee Thomas Middleditch ("The Wolf of Wall Street") and Josh Brener ("The Extras") in the main roles.The series "Silicon Valley" received two Golden Globe nominations for best comedy series.

programme.title: The Jane Austen Book Club
programme.desc: Sacramento, California.The husband leaves Sylvia (Amy Brenneman) for another woman.Two friends of the broken woman, Bernadette (Kathy Baker) and Jocelyn (Maria Bello), decide to help her regain balance in an original way.They establish a literary club bringing together people who share the same passion - literature by Jane Austen.For half a year, Sylvia, her friends, daughter Allegra (Maggie Grace), young teacher Prudie (Emily Blunt) and science-fiction lover Grigg (Hugh Dancy), meet and discuss six more novels by their favorite author.Together they discover that the stories created by the English writer are timeless.Regular meetings also allow club members to look at their own lives from a distance and deal with the problems that concern them.Based on the best-selling book by Karen Joy Fowler, the film was well received by audiences and critics.

programme.title: Doc Ii.
programme.desc: Dr. Amy Larsen, former chief of internal medicine, is rebuilding her life after a tragic accident that left her with no memory.Now she is an intern.Her past still haunts me.

programme.title: Robot Dreams
programme.desc: A lonely and timid Dog lives in colorful, bustling New York.Distrustful, he barricades himself in his apartment and looks at the noisy city with regret.The cure for his fears turns out to be a Robot, which the pet orders under the influence of an advertisement.When the parcel arrives, the dog assembles the sent model.It comes to life and immediately becomes the dog's best friend.From then on, the friends spend fun-filled days together.They go roller skating, eat hot dogs, listen to music and walk the streets of the metropolis.They are inseparable.However, their happy life together ends with a trip to the beach.Bathing in the sea has a tragic ending for Robot - he cannot move and has to stay in a sandy, closed area.The distraught Dog is unable to move it himself.However, she does everything to get him out of there.Once again he must overcome his fear of the world.His immobilized friend also dreams of the day when they will finally meet again.An Oscar-nominated animation based on a comic book by Sara Varon.

programme.title: Marmalade
programme.desc: The quiet Baron (Joe Keery) is sent to prison.She shares a cell with Otis (Aldis Hodge), who has escaped several times from prisons.Initially reluctant, the boy agrees to help him get released when the boy offers him $250,000.When asked where he got the money, Baron tells his story.He lived in a small town with his bedridden mother, Eda (Amy Warner).He supported her and himself by working at the post office.However, he lost his job when he refused to cut his hair.Baron's life was changed by the arrival of the hit Marmalade (Camila Morrone), traumatized by her childhood spent in a foster family, in town.Gradually their relationship became closer.Fascinated by the girl, the simple-minded Baron agreed to rob a bank with her, especially since he lacked money to pay for his mother's medicines.Unfortunately, the plan failed because Marmalade started the jump impulsively.In addition, her actions led to a series of tragic events.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: The year 2050. Mickey Barnes (Robert Pattinson) takes out a loan on usurious terms.Wanting to escape from an aggressive debt collector, together with his friend Timo (Steven Yeun), he joins the crew of a spaceship that is to colonize the ice planet Niflheim.However, while the second of them becomes a shuttle pilot, Mickey - not entirely consciously - becomes the person assigned to the most dangerous tasks.When he dies, in a process called reprinting, a clone of himself is created, which retains his memories.The situation of the version of man number 17 becomes even more complicated when, contrary to expectations, he is not killed during one of the missions, and when he returns to the ship, he finds Mickey 18 there. In these circumstances, the commander of the expedition, Hieronymous Marshall (Mark Ruffalo), decides to eliminate both of them.A surprising, fast-paced and humorous picture by the Oscar-winning writer and director of "Parasite", Bong Joon Ho.The production is an adaptation of the novel by Edward Ashton.
